The '''Overracer''' was a civilian [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] produced by [[Mobquet Swoops and Speeders/Legends|Mobquet Swoops and Speeders]] that was commonly used for military use.

==Characteristics==
[[Mobquet Swoops and Speeders/Legends|Mobquet Swoops and Speeders]]' Overracer was a 4.4 [[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] with an upright seat and forward steering vanes.<ref name="RASB2" /> Little more than an [[Engine/Legends|engine]] with controls,<ref name="AEG" /> the Overracer could reach speeds of five hundred and thirty [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] an [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]], and had a ground clearance of twenty meters. Overracers seated a single rider, and could carry four [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] of cargo.<ref name="RASB2" />

Overracers were armed with a single forward-facing [[Mk 2/S light blaster cannon]],<ref name="MBC" /> although they could be purchased without a weapon in the mount.<ref name="AEG" /> New Overracers cost between 8,000<ref name="RASB2" /> and 13,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to buy,<ref name="AEG" /> between 3,200<ref name="RASB2" /> and 4,500 credits to purchase used. Unarmed Overracers could be bought for 10,000 credits new, and 2,500 used.<ref name="AEG" />

==History==
The Overracer was a civilian speeder bike utilized by professional speeder racers, and as a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] by military forces without access to proper military equipment, such as insurgencies like the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="AEG" /> The Overracer was widely used by the Alliance as a scouting vehicle during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Modifications made to the speeder bikes included stripping non-essential equipment such as [[high-altitude lifter]]s, civilian [[Stabilizer/Legends|stabilizers]], and long-range receivers, reducing the bike to little more than an armed engine with a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]].<ref name="RASB" /> They were equipped with [[Sound dampener/Legends|sound dampeners]] and [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] [[Baffler/Legends|bafflers]] to reduce noise emanations and to distort [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] readings attempting to track the bike.<ref name="RASB2" /> The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' carried six Overracers aboard. These bikes were equipped with comlinks with a maximum range of fifty kilometers.<ref name="TDC">''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''</ref>
